diagrams.title: UX Metrics Classification
diagrams.description: Shows categorization of UX metrics into Behavioral and Attitudinal types
diagrams.purpose: Understand the difference between what users do vs what they think

diagrams.title: NPS Score Calculation
diagrams.description: Visual representation of NPS calculation showing promoters, passives, and detractors
diagrams.purpose: Learn how to calculate NPS from survey data

diagrams.title: HEART Framework
diagrams.description: Five dimensions of the HEART framework for UX measurement
diagrams.purpose: Apply HEART framework to measure UX at scale

diagrams.title: AARRR Pirate Metrics Funnel
diagrams.description: The five stages of the Pirate Metrics framework
diagrams.purpose: Track customer lifecycle and growth metrics

diagrams.title: SUS Score Interpretation Scale
diagrams.description: Visual scale showing SUS score interpretation ranges
diagrams.purpose: Interpret SUS scores and benchmark usability
